query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  edp.digestEnabled,
  edp.digestFrequency,
  edp.digestDay,
  edp.digestTime,
  edp.lastDigestSentAt,
  edp.nextDigestDue,
  edp.timezone
FROM emailDigestPrefs edp
JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
ORDER BY u.name;
